issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' not 'Activated'. Card text says '[When Attacking]' which is an attack trigger.

Action sequence is incomplete. Should include: TrashFromHand (optional/conditional), then SearchDeck to add DON!! from deck, then Rest the added DON!!. Current DSL only trashes and gives DON without searching.
TrashFromHand filter is empty. Should specify optional/conditional trashing (up to 1 card from hand).
Missing Rest action. Card text requires the added DON!! to be rested, but DSL has no Rest action.
GiveDon is incorrect action. Should SearchDeck to fetch DON!! from DON!! deck, not directly give DON!!.
